intro: Bulliarda schkuhrii, also known as Schkuhria, is a perennial plant species native to South America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The health benefits of Bulliarda schkuhrii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
